failure_modes.cause: Loss of heat removal capacity in 32m coil at 120°C with low Re=9 mixing
failure_modes.mitigation: Install distributed temperature monitoring every 5m of coil length

failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG mixture solidifies if temperature drops below 66°C in long coil
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heated jacket with backup heating and low-temp alarm

failure_modes.mode: Pump seal failure under high temperature
failure_modes.cause: HPLC pump seals degrade rapidly at 120°C feed temperature
failure_modes.mitigation: Use high-temp pump seals (FFKM) and implement seal pressure monitoring

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow and causes pressure buildup
Single heating zone — failure causes DES solidification
validation_experiments: Heat-cool cycle test: DES from 25°C to 120°C to 50°C, monitor for crystallization
Thermal stability test: Hold reaction mixture at 130°C for 2h, monitor for decomposition
Pump seal integrity test: Run DES at 120°C for 24h, monitor for leakage and pressure drift
